holdings.infoBox: GRPM is an equity ETF with a total of 61 individual holdings. The top holdings are Lantheus Holdings stock at 4.41%, Sterling Infrastructure at 3.45%, Carpenter Technology at 3.35%, Rambus at 2.93%, and TechnipFMC at 2.79%.

overview.description: The Invesco S&P MidCap 400 GARP ETF (GRPM) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P MidCap 400 GARP index. The fund tracks an index of US mid-cap growth stocks with perceived quality and value characteristics. GRPM was launched on Dec 8, 2010 and is issued by Invesco.
